description:
OL 316 (REV. 7/2020) WWW
Autonomous Mode 
Conventional Mode
Additional information attached.
At approximately 10:33am, a WeRide vehicle (car 1) was stopped at a red traffic light on E San Carlos st. about to turn right on S 4th St. At 
this time a Toyota RAV4 (car 2) approached from behind traveling at a speed of (>10mph) and slammed into car 1's rear - causing damages 
to car 1. Car 1 sustained damages on rear bumper and rear sensors. Both parties pulled over to a safe location to exchange information. Car 
2's driver didn't have an up-to-date registration card for the vehicle.
Print
Clear Form
